reviews.feedback: The Card component shouldn't have a services colorScheme if it contains CardActions or has a services shadowColor, it also doesn't need to use a Divider as this is handled by the CardActions component.

The emphasis button shouldn't be used with forms, use the solid button for primary actions and the outline button for secondary, these should also be on the left, not the right of the page, there is also too much vertical spacing
use a flex wrapper with justifyContent rather than margin on UI elements or Box wrapper components
